use: test whether external sensor evidence can enter PHI-OMEGA audit
accessible_field: bounded external packet from supported evidence producer
observed_issue: An external repo reports stable and fragile features, but the evidence must not become total proof.
dependency: source repo status, object/mode/use alignment, field limit, stable and fragile feature declaration
removal_failure: If source status and field limit are absent, the evidence becomes unaudited or totalized.
proposed_realignment: Admit the packet only as bounded evidence and keep PHI-OMEGA as audit criterion.
